name: Dinner Set – Luxury Editorial Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="ds-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="ds-gold" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1080" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD_DARK"/>
      <stop offset="30%"  stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD"/>
      <stop offset="50%"  stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD_LIGHT"/>
      <stop offset="70%"  stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD_DARK"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="ds-cta" x1="0" y1="0" x2="360" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD_DARK"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="ds-tile-fade" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="60%"  stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="0.6"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <clipPath id="ds-t1"><rect x="0"   y="0" width="356" height="278"/></clipPath>
    <clipPath id="ds-t2"><rect x="362" y="0" width="356" height="278"/></clipPath>
    <clipPath id="ds-t3"><rect x="724" y="0" width="356" height="278"/></clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: deep navy bg -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#ds-bg)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: 3-tile image mosaic -->
  <rect x="0"   y="0" width="356" height="278" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TILE_A"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#ds-t1)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE_1" x="0"   y="0" width="356" height="278" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="356" height="278" fill="url(#ds-tile-fade)"/>

  <rect x="362" y="0" width="356" height="278" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TILE_B"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#ds-t2)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE_2" x="362" y="0" width="356" height="278" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="362" y="0" width="356" height="278" fill="url(#ds-tile-fade)"/>

  <rect x="724" y="0" width="356" height="278" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TILE_A"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#ds-t3)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE_3" x="724" y="0" width="356" height="278" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="724" y="0" width="356" height="278" fill="url(#ds-tile-fade)"/>

  <!-- tile dividers -->
  <line x1="356" y1="0" x2="356" y2="278" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
  <line x1="724" y1="0" x2="724" y2="278" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>

  <!-- tile labels -->
  <text x="178" y="262" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_TILE1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="540" y="262" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_TILE2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="902" y="262" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_TILE3_LABEL</text>

  <!-- LAYER 3: gold rule system -->
  <rect x="0" y="278" width="1080" height="2"   fill="url(#ds-gold)" opacity="0.9"/>
  <rect x="0" y="282" width="1080" height="0.5" fill="url(#ds-gold)" opacity="0.25"/>

  <!-- LAYER 4: store info -->
  <text x="56"   y="346" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="6">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>
  <text x="56"   y="370" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.25" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_LOCATION</text>
  <text x="1024" y="346" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_SET_INFO</text>
  <text x="1024" y="370" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.25" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_SET_SUB</text>
  <line x1="56" y1="390" x2="1024" y2="390" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 5: central product name -->
  <text x="540" y="498" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="32" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.6" font-style="italic" letter-spacing="6">PLACEHOLDER_COLLECTION_WORD</text>
  <text x="540" y="596" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="110" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_MAIN</text>
  <text x="540" y="668" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="42"  font-weight="400" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" font-style="italic" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_SUB</text>

  <!-- LAYER 6: decorative gold ornament -->
  <line x1="200" y1="698" x2="432" y2="698" stroke="url(#ds-gold)" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/>
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="698" rx="8" ry="8" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/>
  <line x1="648" y1="698" x2="880" y2="698" stroke="url(#ds-gold)" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/>

  <!-- LAYER 7: description -->
  <text x="540" y="742" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_DESC_LINE1</text>
  <text x="540" y="768" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_DESC_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 8: piece count circles -->
  <circle cx="270" cy="836" r="48" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.3"/>
  <circle cx="270" cy="836" r="40" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.06"/>
  <text x="270" y="826" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="28" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD">PLACEHOLDER_PC1_COUNT</text>
  <text x="270" y="856" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_PC1_LABEL</text>

  <circle cx="430" cy="836" r="48" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.3"/>
  <circle cx="430" cy="836" r="40" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.06"/>
  <text x="430" y="826" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="28" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD">PLACEHOLDER_PC2_COUNT</text>
  <text x="430" y="856" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_PC2_LABEL</text>

  <circle cx="590" cy="836" r="48" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.3"/>
  <circle cx="590" cy="836" r="40" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.06"/>
  <text x="590" y="826" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="28" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD">PLACEHOLDER_PC3_COUNT</text>
  <text x="590" y="856" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_PC3_LABEL</text>

  <circle cx="750" cy="836" r="48" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.3"/>
  <circle cx="750" cy="836" r="40" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.06"/>
  <text x="750" y="826" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="28" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD">PLACEHOLDER_PC4_COUNT</text>
  <text x="750" y="856" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_PC4_LABEL</text>

  <circle cx="910" cy="836" r="48" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.3"/>
  <circle cx="910" cy="836" r="40" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.06"/>
  <text x="910" y="826" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="28" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD">PLACEHOLDER_PC5_COUNT</text>
  <text x="910" y="856" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_PC5_LABEL</text>

  <!-- LAYER 9: gold rule -->
  <rect x="0" y="900" width="1080" height="1.5" fill="url(#ds-gold)" opacity="0.7"/>
  <rect x="0" y="903" width="1080" height="0.5" fill="url(#ds-gold)" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 10: 5-tile detail strip -->
  <rect x="0"   y="905" width="212" height="195" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TILE_A"/>
  <rect x="218" y="905" width="212" height="195" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TILE_B"/>
  <rect x="436" y="905" width="212" height="195" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TILE_A"/>
  <rect x="654" y="905" width="212" height="195" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TILE_B"/>
  <rect x="872" y="905" width="208" height="195" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TILE_A"/>
  <line x1="216" y1="905" x2="216" y2="1100" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>
  <line x1="434" y1="905" x2="434" y2="1100" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>
  <line x1="652" y1="905" x2="652" y2="1100" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>
  <line x1="870" y1="905" x2="870" y2="1100" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>

  <text x="106" y="1076"  text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_DT1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="324" y="1076"  text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_DT2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="542" y="1076"  text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_DT3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="761" y="1076"  text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_DT4_LABEL</text>
  <text x="976" y="1076"  text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_DT5_LABEL</text>

  <!-- LAYER 11: gold rule -->
  <rect x="0" y="1100" width="1080" height="1.5" fill="url(#ds-gold)" opacity="0.7"/>

  <!-- LAYER 12: bottom price + CTA -->
  <rect x="0" y="1101" width="1080" height="249" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>

  <text x="56"  y="1178" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="5">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_LABEL</text>
  <text x="56"  y="1278" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="96" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>
  <text x="56"  y="1316" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_SUB</text>

  <line x1="700" y1="1118" x2="700" y2="1338" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.15"/>

  <text x="868" y="1166" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" font-weight="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="5">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_AVAILABLE</text>
  <text x="868" y="1206" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="24" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>
  <text x="868" y="1232" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.3" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_URL</text>

  <rect x="716" y="1256" width="304" height="56" rx="0" fill="url(#ds-cta)"/>
  <text x="868" y="1291" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>

  <text x="868" y="1330" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="12" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.25" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_TEXT</text>
</svg>

PLACEHOLDER_DESC_LINE1.label: Description line 1
PLACEHOLDER_DESC_LINE1.default: Fine bone porcelain  ·  Microwave & dishwasher safe

PLACEHOLDER_DESC_LINE2.label: Description line 2
PLACEHOLDER_DESC_LINE2.default: Lead-free  ·  Chip resistant  ·  Gift box included
